'''âb-m-h-v''' ('''kabamhevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cerebellectomize|cerebellectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cerebellectomize|cerebellectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-m-h-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabamhevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==

''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
